# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:

  # Compute Engine instance
  - name: webserver
    type: compute.v1.instance
    properties:
      machineType: n1-standard-1
      zone: us-central1-a
      disks:
        - name: boot
          type: persistent-disk
          boot: true
          autoDelete: true
          initializeParams:
            diskSizeGb: 10
            diskType: pd-standard

  # Cloud SQL database
  - name: database
    type: sql.v1beta4.databaseInstance
    properties:
      name: my-database
      region: us-central1
      databaseVersion: MYSQL_5_7
      settings:
        tier: D2

  # Cloud Storage bucket
  - name: storage
    type: storage.v1.bucket
    properties:
      name: my-bucket

  # Load Balancer
  - name: load-balancer
    type: compute.v1.forwardingRule
    properties:
      target: webserver
      portRange: 80
      loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL
